memoryArtifacts.headline: Gildea Hall, Romford, Essex England home of Anthony Cooke
BIOGRAPHY
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Anthony Cooke, KB[1] (1504 – 11 June 1576) was an English humanist scholar. He was tutor to Edward VI.

Family
Anthony Cooke was the only son of John Cooke (died 10 October 1516), esquire, of Gide …

zh.Gidea Hall, Romford, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可吉迪亞 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir. Anthony Cooke於1505年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Cooke32歲，母親Alice Saunders23歲。他於1523年與Anne FitzWilliam在英國艾可洛福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1573年被列為custos rotulorum of essex。他去世於1576年6月12日在英國倫敦享年71歲，埋葬在英國艾可洛福德。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir. Anthony Cooke was born in 1505, in England, his father, Sir John Cooke, was 32 and his mother, Alice Saunders, was 23. He married Anne FitzWilliam in 1523, in Romford, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1573, his occupation is listed as custos rotulorum of essex. He died on 12 June 1576, in London, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Romford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir. Anthony Cooke est né en 1505, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Cooke, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Saunders, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne FitzWilliam en 1523, à Romford, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1573, sa profession de son indiquée est custos rotulorum of essex. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1576, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Romford, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir. Anthony Cooke 1505 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Cooke 32 und seine Mutter Alice Saunders 23. Er hat 1523 in Romford, Essex, England Anne FitzWilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1573 ist sein Beruf als custos rotulorum of essex aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Juni 1576 im Alter von 71 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Romford, Essex, England begraben.

Lui sposato Anne FitzWilliam nel 1523, nel Romford, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1573, la sua occupazione è indicata come custos rotulorum of essex. Morì il 12 giugno 1576, nel London, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Romford, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir. Anthony Cookeが1505年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Cookeは32歳，母Alice Saundersは23歳であった。1523年にイギリスエセックスロムフォードでAnne FitzWilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1573年，職業はcustos rotulorum of essexと記録されている。彼は1576年6月12日にイギリスロンドンで71歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスロムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir. Anthony Cooke(이)가 1505년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Cooke(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Saunders(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1523년 영국 에세스 롬퍼드에서 Anne FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1573년, 그의 직업은 custos rotulorum of essex이었다. 그는 1576년 6월 12일 영국 런던에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 롬퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir. Anthony Cooke nasceu em 1505, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Cooke, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Saunders, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne FitzWilliam em 1523, em Romford, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1573, sua profissão aparece como custos rotulorum of essex. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1576, em London, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Romford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir. Anthony Cooke родился в 1505 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Cooke было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Saunders, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne FitzWilliam в 1523 г. в местности ромфорд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1573 году он работал по профессии custos rotulorum of essex. Он умер 12 июня 1576 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности ромфорд, эссекс, Англия.
